HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: What is included in annual ROC filing?
faqs.a: AOC-4 (financial statements), MGT-7 (annual return), ADT-1 (auditor appointment). Due within 30-60 days of AGM.
Yes. DIR-12 for appointment/resignation, DIR-3 KYC annual update, DIN deactivation if needed.

faqs.q: What happens if ROC filings are delayed?
faqs.a: Additional fees of ₹100/day per form. Prolonged default can lead to company strike-off and director disqualification.

faqs.q: Do you provide cs services services in Dadra Nagar Haveli and Daman Diu?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Dadra Nagar Haveli and Daman Diu from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Dadra Nagar Haveli and Daman Diu?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Dadra Nagar Haveli and Daman Diu fall under ROC Ahmedabad. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Dadra Nagar Haveli and Daman Diu-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Dadra Nagar Haveli and Daman Diu?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Dadra Nagar Haveli and Daman Diu: As per UT schedule. Professional tax: Not applicable. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
